extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked solo on the Passo de Ganda final climb, dropped MASNADA on the descent despite the local's fearless chase, won by 30 seconds in Bergamo
tactical_patterns: POGACAR attacked solo on final climb Passo de Ganda similar to Tour de France tactics, distancing all chasers including NIBALI.
MASNADA local knowledge on 19-hairpin Selvino descent enabled chase-back after being dropped, but insufficient for sprint finish.
UAE Emirates rode without team support allowing POGACAR solo attack; no classic monument leadout train needed for strongest rider.
ROGLIC and VLASOV both showed poor form on climbs, DNF or dropped early contradicting pre-race GC rider expectations.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Descended aggressively on technical 19-hairpin Selvino after solo climb attack, maintaining gap despite local chaser
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: Local Bergamo rider bridged back to POGACAR after being dropped 30 seconds on climb through superior descent
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Briefly animated with attack bridging to leaders but lacked finishing power, first win in years just days prior
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Not competitive for podium despite Monument pedigree, finished fourth unable to respond to POGACAR attack
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Showed poor form and dropped early on climbs, pre-race GC contender failed to materialize
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Outsprinted ROGLIC for third podium position, unexpected top-three result in Monument without team support
